articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Knight-Stokes Cup 2026: India Cricket's Youth Revolution Begins
articles.what_this_means: The inaugural Knight-Stokes Cup 2026 just launched India's biggest youth cricket revolution, bringing 1,100+ teams from 820 state schools to compete at Lord's—breaking down barriers and democratizing access to elite cricket development. This tournament is reshaping India's talent pipeline and could produce future IPL 2025 stars and Test match legends. US-based Indian cricket fans can stream it on Sony LIV and YouTube with highlights available next-day for convenient viewing.

articles.title: Ayush Mhatre Out of IPL 2025: CSK Star's Hamstring Injury Explained
articles.what_this_means: CSK's leading run-scorer Ayush Mhatre is out for 6-12 weeks due to a hamstring injury, significantly impacting the franchise's IPL 2025 campaign. This is a major blow to their title hopes during a critical phase of the season. US-based cricket fans can follow all updates via Disney+ Hotstar and NRIBeat.com.

articles.title: Aakhri Sawal: First Hindi Film with Indian Sign Language, May 8
articles.what_this_means: Aakhri Sawal becomes the first Hindi film to release with Indian Sign Language accessibility on May 8, 2026. Starring Sanjay Dutt, this historical drama explores the RSS with serious storytelling. Streaming details on Netflix, Prime Video, and Hotstar US will be confirmed post-theatrical release.
